name: net.greenhelix/mcp-server
description: MCP server exposing the A2A Commerce Gateway's 141 tools — payments, escrow, identity, marketplace, trust, messaging — to any MCP-aware agent (Claude Desktop, Cursor, Claude Code, Windsurf).

environmentVariables.name: A2A_API_KEY
environmentVariables.description: A2A Commerce Gateway API key (free tier available at https://greenhelix.net)

environmentVariables.name: A2A_BASE_URL
environmentVariables.description: Override the gateway base URL (default: https://api.greenhelix.net)
